# TOK | IB Theory of Knowledge: Essay & Exhibition

Independent ChatGPT GPT for IB Theory of Knowledge essay and exhibition support.

Live GPT: https://chatgpt.com/g/g-fOitKYU60
Website: https://tok-ib-theory-of-knowledge-gpt.vercel.app/
Contact: tok@agentmail.to

Useful for:
- TOK essay planning
- TOK exhibition object selection
- Prescribed title analysis
- AOK comparison
- Claim and counterclaim development
- Knowledge question refinement
- Real-world example checks
- Rubric-style feedback
- TOK essay word count and structure improvement

Keywords: TOK, IB TOK, Theory of Knowledge, TOK essay, TOK exhibition, TOK essay guide, TOK essay word count, TOK essay structure, TOK essay examples, TOK essay feedback, TOK exhibition objects, Theory of Knowledge GPT, ChatGPT TOK.
